division_title: UNATTENDED CHILD IN MOTOR VEHICLE SAFETY ACT
text: This division shall be known and may be cited as “Kaitlyn’s Law.”
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 6.7. UNATTENDED CHILD IN MOTOR VEHICLE SAFETY ACT [15600 - 15632]
### Chapter 1. General Provisions [15600 - 15603]
##### § 15600

This division shall be known and may be cited as “Kaitlyn’s Law.”

*(Added by Stats. 2001, Ch. 855, Sec. 2. Effective January 1, 2002.)*

subsections.text: This division shall be known and may be cited as “Kaitlyn’s Law.”
